tasks.title: Analyze existing saved items storage and retrieval in extension
tasks.description: Investigate how saved items such as vocabulary and phrases are stored and retrieved in the extension, focusing on apps/extension/src/content-script/saveSelectedText.ts and related storage keys like 'savedItems'. Document data structure, storage mechanism, and APIs used.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear understanding of savedItems data structure and storage method
Documented APIs and storage keys used for saved items
tasks.expectedResult: A document or notes describing how saved items are stored and accessed in the extension codebase

outputPlan.description: Documentation of saved items storage and retrieval in extension

metadata.inputContext: Project source code of extension content scripts and storage usage
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational knowledge of saved items storage for new tab implementation

tasks.title: Research UI patterns for adding a new tab in the extension popup
tasks.description: Investigate the current extension popup UI code to understand how tabs are implemented and navigated. Identify the files and components responsible for tab rendering and navigation. Document the approach to add a new tab for storing user saved study links.
acceptanceCriteria: Identified popup UI components managing tabs
Documented method to add a new tab in the popup UI
tasks.expectedResult: A document describing the popup tab UI structure and how to add a new tab

outputPlan.description: Documentation of popup UI tab structure and extension points

metadata.inputContext: Extension popup source code and UI components
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides UI integration plan for new tab in extension popup

tasks.title: Investigate existing user data models and storage for user-generated content
tasks.description: Examine packages/content/src/userContent.ts and related storage modules to understand how user-generated content is modeled, stored, and accessed. Focus on data structures, APIs, and editing mechanisms relevant to storing user saved links or notes.
acceptanceCriteria: Documented user content data models and storage APIs
Identified reusable components or patterns for new user saved items
tasks.expectedResult: A document describing user content data models and storage mechanisms

outputPlan.description: Documentation of user content data models and storage APIs

metadata.inputContext: User content source code and storage modules
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides data model foundation for new saved links tab

tasks.title: Define data model and storage schema for study links tab
tasks.description: Based on research of existing saved items and user content storage, define a precise data model and storage schema for the new study links tab. Specify fields such as id, url, title, notes, tags, createdAt, updatedAt. Decide storage location (e.g., extension local storage, IndexedDB, or user content DB).
acceptanceCriteria: Data model JSON schema or TypeScript interface defined
tasks.expectedResult: A formal data model and storage schema document for study links tab

outputPlan.description: Data model and storage schema for study links tab

metadata.inputContext: User content storage documentation and saved items storage analysis
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Defines the data foundation for implementing the new tab

tasks.title: Design UI component for Study Links tab in extension popup
tasks.description: Design the React component for the new Study Links tab in the extension popup. Include UI elements for listing saved links with title, URL, notes, tags, and timestamps. Include controls for adding, editing, deleting entries. Document component structure, props, and state management approach.
acceptanceCriteria: Component design document with UI mockup or wireframe
Defined props and state management plan
tasks.expectedResult: A detailed UI component design document for the Study Links tab

outputPlan.description: UI component design for Study Links tab

metadata.inputContext: Popup UI tab structure and data model for study links
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides UI blueprint for coding the new tab

tasks.title: Plan integration of Study Links tab with existing saved items and storage APIs
tasks.description: Plan how the new Study Links tab will integrate with existing saved items storage and user content APIs. Define methods for loading, saving, updating, and deleting study links. Specify any new APIs or storage handlers needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration plan document with API usage and extension points
Defined new API signatures if needed
tasks.expectedResult: A documented integration plan for Study Links tab storage and APIs

outputPlan.description: Integration plan for Study Links tab with storage and APIs

metadata.inputContext: Saved items storage and user content storage documentation
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures smooth integration of new tab with existing storage

tasks.title: Document user interaction flows for Study Links tab
tasks.description: Define detailed user interaction flows for the Study Links tab including adding a new link, editing notes, tagging, deleting entries, and viewing details. Include error handling and edge cases. Produce flow diagrams or step-by-step descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Clear handling of edge cases and errors
tasks.expectedResult: User interaction flow document for Study Links tab

outputPlan.description: User interaction flows for Study Links tab

metadata.inputContext: UI component design for Study Links tab
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Prepares detailed interaction blueprint for implementation
